name: camman18
oneLine: American Minecraft YouTuber best known for short-form challenge videos and trivia-style commentary.
bio: Cameron Manning, born February 22, 2004, runs camman18, a Minecraft-focused channel that exploded on YouTube Shorts and TikTok with rapid-fire challenge clips and rare-fact commentary. Content centres on Minecraft challenges, speedruns, hardcore runs and trivia about obscure mechanics. The brand has expanded to multiple sister channels covering vods, shorts and live content.
notable: But Every X Y Minecraft challenge format
